title.label: Admin Dashboard Browser Title
title.help: The browser title displayed in admin dashboard pages. This appears in the browser tab and bookmarks.

pagination.label: Dashboard Table Pagination
pagination.help: The number of items to display per page in the dashboard table. Set the value to 0 to disable pagination. When set to 0, all items will be displayed on a single page.

accent.label: Dashboard Accent Color
accent.help: The accent color used throughout the admin dashboard.
